prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: D&D 5e / Forgotten Realms inspired high fantasy world map, diverse archipelago terrain type.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye atlas view of a vast fantasy ocean filled with many island groups and microcontinents.
Subject: diverse archipelago layout with uneven island distribution across a broad ocean: several large islands, microcontinents, tiny islets, curved island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, volcanic islands, fragmented coasts, and irregular natural spacing. Include multiple climates across islands: icy north, volcanic chain, jungle islands, desert island, temperate forests, wetlands, mountain islands.
Style/medium: illustrated fantasy world map, cartographic parchment style, Tolkien-esque high fantasy atlas, digital fantasy concept art, highly detailed hand-painted RPG sourcebook map.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, no single dominant mainland, island groups sweep in organic arcs and clusters, full archipelago visible with ocean border.
Lighting/mood: heroic high fantasy, magical atmosphere, ancient ruins and small coastal settlements, scattered dungeon entrances, glowing rune stones, tiny distant dragons used sparingly.
Color palette: aged parchment, teal and deep blue ocean, rich varied biome colors, clear coastlines and reef shallows.
Materials/textures: parchment grain, engraved ink lines, painted terrain, detailed waves and shoals.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Avoid grid-like spacing and avoid identical island shapes.
